summary: Demand evidence agents completed and PRD readiness passed.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness must block PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
risks: A PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence if missing fields are ignored.

blockers.message: explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.
protocol.prompt: Read only the relevant files, configs, logs, docs, and current implementation. Return claims with exact paths/lines or source summaries. Separate assumptions from facts.

evidence_tasks.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Independently verify high-risk factual claims and challenge the explorer result.
protocol.prompt: Use independent reads or sources. Confirm, weaken, or contradict each claim. Any conflict must become a blocker instead of being averaged away.
protocol.required_when: evidence_policy === cross_check or claim risk is high

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

evidence_tasks.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

state.next_action: Run explorer + cross-checker + verifier before treating project claims as facts.

actions.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.
protocol.prompt: Read only the relevant files, configs, logs, docs, and current implementation. Return claims with exact paths/lines or source summaries. Separate assumptions from facts.

protocol.required_when: evidence_policy === cross_check or claim risk is high

actions.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand router prd_readiness already creates blockers when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed status; missing and clarify recommendations cannot produce prd_ready true.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing data is reported (lines 496-502), and creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker when recommendation is clarify/blocked/block or verdict is blocked/failed (lines 503-509).
evidence.why: This is the core logic that ensures evidence agent recommendations become blockers.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each complete evidence agent result and adds all returned issues to the blocker list (lines 726-732).
evidence.why: This confirms that blocking issues from evidence agents are added to the PRD readiness blocker list.

evidence.summary: Required evidence agent roles (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) are enforced by adding EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers when any required role has not completed with evidence and a result (lines 717-725).
evidence.why: This confirms that all required evidence agents must complete before PRD readiness can be true.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning PRD readiness is true only when no blockers exist (line 756).
evidence.why: This confirms that any blocker, including those from evidence agents, prevents prd_ready from being true.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' verifies that when cross-checker reports missing data and recommends clarify, PRD readiness is false and blockers include EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED (lines 350-352).
evidence.why: This test proves the current behavior matches the desired outcome.

evidence.summary: Test 'cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result' verifies that when only explorer completes but cross-checker and verifier are missing, PRD readiness is false (lines 170-172).
evidence.why: This test confirms that missing required evidence agents block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems function filters out non-actionable status notes like 'no missing data identified' or '100% agreement' to avoid treating them as actual missing items (lines 98-110).
evidence.why: This explains how the router distinguishes between actual missing data and status summaries.

evidence.summary: Test 'non-missing status notes in missing arrays do not block readiness' verifies that status notes like 'No missing data identified' and 'All required evidence tasks completed' do not block PRD readiness (lines 632).
evidence.why: This test confirms the router correctly filters non-actionable status notes.

evidence.summary: requiredEvidenceRoles function returns ['explorer', 'cross-checker', 'verifier'] for cross_check policy, and ['explorer', 'verifier'] for single_agent policy (lines 475-479).
evidence.why: This defines which evidence agents are required based on evidence policy.

evidence.summary: If any evidence agent recommends cross_check, the required roles are expanded to include explorer, cross-checker, and verifier (lines 710-716).
evidence.why: This shows that cross_check requests dynamically upgrade the required evidence agents.

risks: If this claim is wrong, the demand could generate a PRD from incomplete evidence.

result.notes: The current implementation already satisfies the demand. Evidence agent missing/clarify/block/failed statuses create blockers that prevent prd_ready from being true. The tests confirm this behavior works as intended.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand router prd_readiness already creates blockers when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed status; missing and clarify recommendations cannot produce prd_ready true.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0 (lines 496-502), and creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker when recommendation is clarify/blocked/block or verdict is blocked/failed (lines 503-509).
evidence.why: Core logic that converts evidence agent recommendations into blockers.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates required roles, checks completion status, and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each complete result (lines 717-733). Line 727 adds all blocking issues to blockerList.
evidence.why: Confirms blocking issues from evidence agents are propagated to PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness from being true.
evidence.why: Final gatekeeper condition that prevents PRD readiness when blockers exist.

evidence.summary: Test verifies cross-checker with missing data and clarify recommendation results in prd_ready false and blockers including EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED.
evidence.why: Proves the implementation matches intended behavior for missing/clarify cases.

evidence.summary: Test verifies only explorer completing (missing cross-checker and verifier) results in prd_ready false, while all three agents completing with proceed results in prd_ready true.
evidence.why: Proves required evidence agents must complete before PRD readiness can be true.

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems filters out non-actionable status notes using isNonMissingStatusItem which matches patterns like 'no missing data identified' and 'all required evidence tasks completed'.
evidence.why: Explains how status notes are distinguished from actual missing data.

evidence.summary: Test verifies status notes like 'No missing data identified', '100% agreement', and 'All required evidence tasks completed' do not block PRD readiness (prd_ready is true).
evidence.why: Confirms non-missing status notes are correctly filtered out.

evidence.summary: requiredEvidenceRoles returns ['explorer', 'cross-checker', 'verifier'] for cross_check policy, and ['explorer', 'verifier'] for single_agent policy.
evidence.why: Defines required evidence agents based on evidence policy.

evidence.summary: If any evidence agent recommends cross_check, required roles are expanded to include explorer, cross-checker, and verifier via unique array merge.
evidence.why: Shows dynamic upgrade of required agents when cross_check is recommended.

risks: If this claim is incorrect, a PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence without blockers.

result.notes: Independent verification confirms all explorer evidence records. The implementation correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed status. Tests confirm this behavior works as intended.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand router prd_readiness already creates blockers when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed status; missing and clarify recommendations cannot produce prd_ready true.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function converts evidence agent missing/clarify/block/failed statuses into EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED, or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blockers.
evidence.why: Core logic that prevents PRD readiness when evidence agents report issues.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each complete evidence agent result and adds returned issues to blockerList.
evidence.why: Confirms blocking issues from evidence agents are propagated to PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness from being true.
evidence.why: Final gatekeeper condition ensuring blockers prevent prd_ready true.

evidence.summary: Test verifies cross-checker with missing data and clarify recommendation results in prd_ready false with EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers.
evidence.why: Proves implementation matches intended behavior for missing/clarify cases.

evidence.summary: Test verifies status notes like 'no missing data identified' do not block PRD readiness (prd_ready is true).
evidence.why: Confirms actionableMissingItems correctly filters non-actionable status notes.

risks: If this verification is incorrect, a PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence without proper blocking.

result.notes: Verification confirms: (1) No assumptions presented as facts - all evidence records have project-scoped sources with exact paths and line numbers. (2) Evidence paths are usable - all src/demand/router.ts and __tests__/demand-router.test.ts references exist and are accessible. (3) No unresolved missing data - both explorer and cross-checker returned empty missing arrays and high confidence. (4) Cross-check agreement is 100% - cross-checker independently verified all explorer evidence records with identical conclusions. (5) The implementation already satisfies the demand - missing/clarify/block/failed statuses create blockers that prevent prd_ready true.
